name: Recollect
syncedLyrics:
[id: ngi84687]
[ar: Konomi Suzuki & Ashnikko]
[al: Recollect - Single]
[ti: Recollect]
[au: Giga & TeddyLoid]
[length: 03:10]

[00:03.85]Giga, TeddyLoid
[00:06.68]Transforming the pain and rewriting your name
[00:10.18]「零」戻りまた再生
[00:13.34]I'm lost in the hollows
[00:15.17]運命廻れ、悠久のパレード
[00:18.68]I know the fate that awaits
[00:20.08]Change me, forge me, make me new
[00:23.44]Make me myth, make me legend
[00:25.13]Die and I reboot, everything I do for you
[00:29.68]Go on wield me like a weapon, let me meet my doom
[00:33.36]嗚呼、焦がす鼓動
[00:36.63]繰り返しても、絶望に争え
[00:39.97]Ah, oh whoa
[00:43.02]命かき鳴らして
[00:45.57]名を失くしても、僕は在ると
[00:49.00]滅びの中、響くアリア
[00:52.67]愛の答え 裂き繋いだ (break it, burn it, save it)
[00:57.73]囚われ (yeah!)
[00:59.67]金輪際 big juicer, and I'm ready to crush
[01:02.87]もういいかい？Standing in the destruction
[01:05.82]この刻が say my name, we're ending this now
[01:09.19](Watch it) you're gonna face my anima
[01:11.44]Die and live it, now get up, get up!
[01:13.63]Rip the fabric of reality
[01:15.38]Let magic stitch you back together (oh-oh)
[01:18.12]One, two, three (hold up)
[01:21.40]
[01:33.43]濁る呼吸の奥で
[01:36.64]ひび割れた君の影 oh-oh
[01:40.13]無色になる声 oh-oh
[01:44.80]抱きつづけた 記憶など
[01:48.29]Resurrect when I die
[01:49.70]Nothing to lose when I fight
[01:51.57]I respawn in the night
[01:53.07]Ah-ah-ah-ah-ah, alchemize
[01:54.83]Change me, make me divine
[01:56.54]Crystalline onyx eyes
[01:58.15]Loving you's summertime
[01:59.62]I'm the calamity type
[02:01.57]Break neck incantation
[02:03.19]Chessboard, I can play them
[02:04.80]Creatures, I can slay them
[02:06.44]Break it, burn it, save it
[02:08.10]Waking something ancient (oh whoa)
[02:09.58]Make the whole world my playpen
[02:10.87]命かき鳴らして
[02:13.27]全部消えても、ここにいるよ
[02:16.97]祈りの中、巡るカルマ
[02:20.33]重ね合わせ 愛したんだ (break it, burn it, save it)
[02:26.50]名を失くしても、僕は在ると
[02:30.03]滅びの中、響くアリア
[02:33.61]愛の答え 裂き繋いだ (break it, burn it, save it)
[02:38.72]囚われ (yeah!)
[02:40.63]金輪際 big juicer, and I'm ready to crush
[02:43.84]もういいかい？ Standing in the destruction
[02:46.75]この刻が say my name, we're ending this now
[02:50.02](Watch it) you're gonna face my anima
[02:52.46]Die and live it, now get up, get up!
[02:54.88]Whoa! Oh whoa
[02:59.47]Yo, check it out!
[03:00.99]残響から乱深化 結んでいた因果
[03:04.18]隠されたアルカナ さあ、Recollect now
[03:07.95]
